name: Freelancer
tagline: Search freelance projects, view details, and manage bids on Freelancer.com
description: Search and manage freelance projects, bids, and jobs on Freelancer.com. Requires an OAuth2 access token issued from a registered Freelancer.com developer application, sent as a Freelancer-OAuth-V1 header.

auth.hint: Register an app and complete the OAuth2 flow at the Freelancer.com developer portal to obtain an access token, then send it as the Freelancer-OAuth-V1 header value (not Authorization: Bearer).

tools.name: search_active_projects
tools.description: Search currently active projects open for bidding by keyword.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of projects to return (SDK default is 10).

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of projects to skip for pagination.

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Retrieve full details for a single project by its numeric ID.

tools.name: list_bids
tools.description: List bids, optionally filtered by project IDs, with pagination.

params.name: projects[]
params.description: One or more project IDs to filter bids by.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of bids to return (SDK default is 10).

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of bids to skip for pagination.

tools.name: place_project_bid
tools.description: Place a bid on a project as the authenticated freelancer.

params.name: project_id
params.description: ID of the project to bid on.

params.name: bidder_id
params.description: User ID of the bidding freelancer (the authenticated account).

params.name: amount
params.description: Bid amount in the project's currency.

params.name: milestone_percentage
params.description: Percentage of the amount requested as an initial milestone.

tools.name: get_jobs
tools.description: Retrieve job/skill category definitions used to tag and search projects.

params.name: jobs[]
params.description: One or more job/skill category IDs to retrieve.

params.name: lang
params.description: Language code for localized job names, e.g. en.
